hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】“市场站稳脚跟”：由于疲软的就业数据缓解了利率担忧，比特币在美国独立日之前反弹至 61,000 美元；【FINANCE】随着美联储制定新方针，沃什面临多种替代通胀迹象；【AI】惠普公司与 OpenAI 建立 Frontier 战略合作伙伴关系。

items.title: ‘Markets find their footing’: Bitcoin holds $61,000 rebound ahead of US Independence Day as soft jobs data eases rate fears
items.summary: Bitcoin holds above $61,000 and ether above $1,700 as soft U.S. jobs data eases Fed hike bets and spot ETFs snap a 10-day outflow streak.
items.title_zh: “市场站稳脚跟”：由于疲软的就业数据缓解了利率担忧，比特币在美国独立日之前反弹至 61,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 由于疲软的美国就业数据缓解了美联储加息的预期，且现货 ETF 结束了连续 10 天的资金流出，比特币维持在 61,000 美元上方，以太币维持在 1,700 美元上方。

items.title: Warsh faces multiple alternative inflation signs as Fed charts new course
items.summary: Warsh has said that inflation is a "choice." The same could also be true of how inflation is measured.
items.title_zh: 随着美联储制定新方针，沃什面临多种替代通胀迹象
items.summary_zh: 沃什曾表示，通货膨胀是一种“选择”。通货膨胀的衡量方式也可能如此。

items.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
items.summary: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.
items.title_zh: 惠普公司与 OpenAI 建立 Frontier 战略合作伙伴关系
items.summary_zh: HP Inc. 扩大其 OpenAI Frontier 合作伙伴关系，在客户体验、软件开发和企业运营领域部署 AI。

items.title: Institutional Bitcoin Adoption Explained: How Blackrock, Fidelity and Others Embraced BTC
items.summary: Institutional adoption is when organizations such as asset managers, corporations, hedge funds, banks, pension funds, and insurers get involved in crypto. This can mean investing in bitcoin directly or building products and services around it. The trend accelerated sharply after
items.title_zh: 机构比特币采用解释：贝莱德、富达等公司如何拥抱比特币
items.summary_zh: 机构采用是指资产管理公司、公司、对冲基金、银行、养老基金和保险公司等组织参与加密货币。这可能意味着直接投资比特币或围绕比特币构建产品和服务。此后趋势急剧加速

items.title: New chip could help tiny robots traverse complex environments
items.summary: Researchers combined an efficient algorithm with dedicated hardware to rapidly generate 3D maps for navigation using minimal memory and power.
items.title_zh: 新芯片可以帮助微型机器人穿越复杂的环境
items.summary_zh: 研究人员将高效算法与专用硬件相结合，使用最少的内存和功耗快速生成用于导航的 3D 地图。

items.title: Long Lines for Gas Shatter the Illusion of Normalcy in Wartime Russia
items.summary: “Are we in the Soviet Union now?” asked one Russian, stunned and frustrated by the waits at the pumps.
items.title_zh: 排长队领取天然气打破了战时俄罗斯正常的幻想
items.summary_zh: “我们现在是在苏联吗？”一位俄罗斯人问道，他对加油站的等待感到震惊和沮丧。

items.title: Crypto bulls on firmer footing as U.S. rate-hike risk recedes
items.summary: Crypto ended the week in a more buoyant state after weak U.S. jobs data reduced the chances of a Fed interest-rate increase and Uniswap gained on a link-up with Robinhood.
items.title_zh: 随着美国加息风险消退，加密货币多头站稳脚跟
items.summary_zh: 在疲软的美国就业数据降低了美联储加息的可能性以及 Uniswap 与 Robinhood 的合作后，加密货币本周以更加活跃的状态结束。

items.title: IMF says policy choices will determine whether tokenization strengthens or fragments the financial system
items.summary: The IMF's Tobias Adrian said risks could shift from banks toward market infrastructure providers and smart contracts as tokenization expands.
items.title_zh: 国际货币基金组织表示政策选择将决定代币化是加强还是分裂金融体系
items.summary_zh: 国际货币基金组织的托比亚斯·阿德里安表示，随着代币化的扩大，风险可能会从银行转向市场基础设施提供商和智能合约。

items.title: Bitcoin whales bought $16.7 billion of bitcoin in 2 weeks even as ETFs bled a record $4 billion
items.summary: U.S. institutional demand had its worst month ever in June. Large holders absorbed the selling, marking a divergence that has shown up near past cycle bottoms.
items.title_zh: 比特币鲸鱼在两周内购买了 167 亿美元的比特币，尽管 ETF 的亏损创纪录的 40 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 美国机构需求六月份经历了有史以来最糟糕的一个月。大股东吸收了抛售，标志着过去周期底部附近出现的分歧。

items.title: Finally. $221 million flow into Bitcoin ETFs, ending a painful 10-day outflow streak
items.summary: Spot ETFs had their strongest inflow day in two months, driven by funds other than BlackRock’s IBIT.
items.title_zh: 最后。 2.21 亿美元流入比特币 ETF，结束了连续 10 天的痛苦流出
items.summary_zh: 在贝莱德 IBIT 以外的基金的推动下，现货 ETF 出现了两个月来最强劲的流入日。

items.title: US bitcoin ETFs break 10-day negative streak with $222 million worth of inflows
items.summary: BlackRock's IBIT was the only fund to see net outflows on Thursday, shedding $40.4 million and continuing its negative streak.
items.title_zh: 美国比特币ETF打破10天负增长，资金流入达2.22亿美元
items.summary_zh: 贝莱德 (BlackRock) 的 IBIT 是周四唯一一只出现净流出的基金，损失了 4040 万美元，并继续下跌。

items.title: Inaugural Music Technology Research Showcase celebrates work of new graduate program’s initial students
items.summary: Associate Professor Anna Huang delivers the keynote address, “In Search of Human-AI Resonance,” to a capacity crowd.
items.title_zh: 首届音乐技术研究展示会庆祝新研究生项目首批学生的工作
items.summary_zh: 黄安娜副教授向众多观众发表了题为“寻找人类与人工智能的共鸣”的主题演讲。

items.title: Citadel's hedge funds post broad first-half gains, top performing strategy sidesteps quant selloff
items.summary: The hedge fund firm's tactical trading fund, which combines discretionary equity investing with quantitative strategies, climbed 14.3% through the end of June.
items.title_zh: Citadel 的对冲基金上半年大幅上涨，表现最佳的策略避开了量化抛售
items.summary_zh: 这家对冲基金公司的战术交易基金将全权委托股票投资与量化策略相结合，截至 6 月底上涨了 14.3%。

items.title: Prolific tech analyst Dan Ives is exiting Wedbush for a new venture
items.summary: Ives said the new firm will seek to build what he described as a "modern merchant bank."
items.title_zh: 多产科技分析师丹·艾夫斯 (Dan Ives) 即将离开韦德布什 (Wedbush) 前往一家新公司
items.summary_zh: 艾夫斯表示，新公司将寻求建立他所说的“现代商业银行”。

items.title: Inflation peaked in May as energy prices fell in June, Kalshi traders think
items.summary: Speculators on the prediction market platform give less than 30% odds to inflation peaking above 4.2% in 2026.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员认为，随着能源价格在 6 月份下跌，通胀在 5 月份达到顶峰
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台上的投机者认为，2026 年通胀率达到 4.2% 以上峰值的可能性不到 30%。

items.title: Xi touts China Communist Party's global influence in speech marking 105th anniversary
items.summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping spoke Wednesday to commemorate the 105th anniversary of the ruling Communist Party of China.
items.title_zh: 习近平在庆祝建党105周年讲话中宣扬中国共产党的全球影响力
items.summary_zh: 中国国家主席习近平周三发表讲话，纪念中国共产党成立105周年。

items.title: China-linked actors target more than technology as AI competition with U.S. intensifies
items.summary: Cyberattacks from China-based entities are on the rise and not just targeting specific tech, analysts warn, as the U.S. AI race intensifies.
items.title_zh: 随着与美国的人工智能竞争加剧，与中国相关的参与者的目标不仅仅是技术
items.summary_zh: 分析师警告称，随着美国人工智能竞赛的加剧，来自中国实体的网络攻击正在增加，而且不仅仅针对特定技术。

items.title: Polish PM warns critical months ahead in face of Russian threat
items.summary: Tusk says Poland is preparing for "various" scenarios after media reports of a planned Russian attack.
items.title_zh: 波兰总理警告未来几个月面临俄罗斯威胁
items.summary_zh: 图斯克表示，在媒体报道俄罗斯计划发动袭击后，波兰正在为“各种”情况做准备。

items.title: France records 2,025 excess deaths at peak of heatwave as Europe braces for more extreme weather
items.summary: Forecasters are warning of further extreme temperatures on the continent in the next few days.
items.title_zh: 法国在热浪高峰期超额死亡 2,025 人，欧洲正准备迎接更极端的天气
items.summary_zh: 预报员警告未来几天非洲大陆将出现进一步的极端气温。

items.title: Four Reasons Crimea Has Become Crucial in the Ukraine War
items.summary: Escalating drone strikes, fuel shortages and power cuts in the region Russia annexed are among the factors turning up the heat on President Vladimir V. Putin.
items.title_zh: 克里米亚在乌克兰战争中变得至关重要的四个原因
items.summary_zh: 俄罗斯吞并地区不断升级的无人机袭击、燃料短缺和断电等因素让俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·V·普京(Vladimir V. Putin)感到愤怒。

items.title: Can the World’s Largest Stadium Explain the Global Economy?
items.summary: High growth rates and surging exports in Vietnam mask deep frustrations in one of Asia’s most ambitious countries.
items.title_zh: 世界上最大的体育场能解释全球经济吗？
items.summary_zh: 越南的高增长率和出口激增掩盖了亚洲最雄心勃勃的国家之一的深深挫败感。

items.title: U.S. Hopes for Investment in Iran Would Break With Decades of History
items.summary: Senior U.S. officials have said Iran would be richly rewarded for changing its stance on the United States. Iran’s leaders have rejected such a bargain in the past.
items.title_zh: 美国对伊朗投资的希望将打破数十年的历史
items.summary_zh: 美国高级官员表示，伊朗如果改变对美国的立场，将会获得丰厚的回报。伊朗领导人过去曾拒绝过这样的交易。

items.title: Trump says there is ‘nothing wrong’ with family’s crypto windfall
items.summary: The president reported at least $1.4 billion in crypto income for 2025. He told CNBC he did nothing illegal and was not aware of the extent of his holdings. Critics say he is profiting from the office while his administration writes the industry's rules.
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示家族的加密货币意外之财“没有任何问题”
items.summary_zh: 总统报告称，2025 年加密货币收入至少为 14 亿美元。他告诉 CNBC，他没有做任何违法行为，并且不知道自己持有的加密货币数量有多少。批评者称，当他的政府制定行业规则时，他正在从办公室中获利。

items.title: Live updates: Bitcoin rises above $62,000 as the red hot semiconductor trade starts to fade
items.title_zh: 实时更新：随着炙手可热的半导体贸易开始消退，比特币升至 62,000 美元以上

items.title: Bank of Russia governor says ‘everything is ready’ for widespread use of digital ruble ahead of September rollout
items.summary: The central bank is also actively discussing the use of stablecoins for international settlements, but only to complement the digital ruble.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯央行行长表示，数字卢布在 9 月份推出之前“一切准备就绪”
items.summary_zh: 央行还在积极讨论使用稳定币进行国际结算，但只是为了补充数字卢布。

items.title: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
items.summary: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.
items.title_zh: 核心转储流行病学：修复 18 年前的错误
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 工程师使用大规模核心转储分析来调试罕见的基础设施崩溃，发现硬件故障和长期存在的软件错误。

items.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
items.summary: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.
items.title_zh: 纽约市的教育工作者和行业领袖齐聚 Google 办公室，共同塑造课堂人工智能的未来。
items.summary_zh: Google、纽约就业首席执行官委员会和 Urban Assembly 为 150 名教育和行业领导者举办了人工智能峰会。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
items.title_zh: 我们最新的 Google 财经升级，包括新应用
items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: Nasa launches mission to save falling space telescope
items.summary: A Nasa-funded robot has blasted off to catch a falling telescope in mid-orbit and blast it back to safety before it burns up.
items.title_zh: 美国宇航局启动拯救坠落太空望远镜的任务
items.summary_zh: 美国宇航局资助的一个机器人已发射升空，以接住中轨坠落的望远镜，并在其燃烧之前将其炸回安全地带。

items.summary: Your day-ahead look for July 3, 2026

items.summary_zh: 2026 年 7 月 3 日天气预报

items.title: Memory and semiconductor stocks lose momentum, bitcoin rebounds in sign of changing investor focus
items.summary: After dominating markets in 2026, AI-tied memory and semiconductor stocks are losing momentum, raising the question whether capital will shift back into bitcoin.
items.title_zh: 内存和半导体股票失去动力，比特币反弹，表明投资者焦点发生变化
items.summary_zh: 在 2026 年主导市场之后，与人工智能相关的内存和半导体股票正在失去动力，引发了资本是否会重新转向比特币的问题。

items.title: CryptoQuant says bitcoin and altcoin exchange deposits have spiked, indicating higher volatility ahead
items.summary: Bitcoin deposits to exchanges recently climbed to nearly 49,000 BTC, "a rare extreme" seen only four other times this year, CryptoQuant said.
items.title_zh: CryptoQuant 表示比特币和山寨币交易所存款激增，表明未来波动性更大
items.summary_zh: CryptoQuant 表示，交易所的比特币存款最近攀升至近 49,000 BTC，这是“罕见的极端”，今年仅出现过四次。

items.title: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
items.summary: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.
items.title_zh: GeneBench-Pro 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 GeneBench-Pro，这是一个使用复杂的真实数据集测试基因组学、生物学和科学研究中人工智能性能的新基准。

items.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
items.summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.
items.title_zh: 预览 GPT-5.6 Sol：下一代模型
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 预览了 GPT-5.6 Sol，这是一种下一代模型，在编码、科学和网络安全方面具有更强的能力，并配有最先进的安全堆栈。

items.title: How agents are transforming work
items.summary: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.
items.title_zh: 客服人员如何改变工作方式
items.summary_zh: 一篇新的 OpenAI 研究论文展示了人工智能代理如何改变工作方式，实现更长、更复杂的任务，并提高跨角色的生产力。

items.title_zh: 使用 NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel 加速 Transformer 微调

items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 6 月起最新的 AI 更新。

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026

items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: David Autor named head of the Department of Economics
items.summary: A faculty member since 1999, Autor is a leading researcher in artificial intelligence and the work of the future.
items.title_zh: 大卫·奥托尔被任命为经济系系主任
items.summary_zh: Autor 自 1999 年起担任教员，是人工智能和未来工作领域的领先研究员。

items.title: LLMs help robots understand vague instructions and focus on key details
items.summary: To help robots do chores in places like homes and factories, a new approach from MIT uses one language model to clarify users’ instructions, then another to ignore irrelevant info.
items.title_zh: 法学硕士帮助机器人理解模糊的指令并专注于关键细节
items.summary_zh: 为了帮助机器人在家庭和工厂等地方做家务，麻省理工学院的一种新方法使用一种语言模型来澄清用户的指令，然后使用另一种语言模型来忽略不相关的信息。

items.title: Exploring the societal impacts of AI
items.summary: During the AI and Society Forum, leading MIT researchers examined critical questions about AI’s influence on employment and democracy.
items.title_zh: 探索人工智能的社会影响
items.summary_zh: 在人工智能与社会论坛期间，麻省理工学院的主要研究人员研究了有关人工智能对就业和民主影响的关键问题。

items.title: Don't throw away your shot to speak to an AI Alexander Hamilton at Boston's new finance museum
items.summary: Nearly a decade after leaving its former home, the Museum of American Finance is opening its new doors to the public.
items.title_zh: 不要放弃在波士顿新金融博物馆与人工智能亚历山大·汉密尔顿交谈的机会
items.summary_zh: 离开旧址近十年后，美国金融博物馆向公众敞开了新的大门。

items.title: SpaceX may emerge as ultimate blueprint for new wave of mega-cap IPOs
items.summary: "It would not surprise me at all to see a similar dynamic play out with some of these [IPOs] set to come in the months ahead," the Kathmere Capital CIO says.
items.title_zh: SpaceX可能成为新一波大型IPO的最终蓝图
items.summary_zh: Kathmere Capital 首席信息官表示：“如果在未来几个月内看到其中一些 [IPO] 出现类似的动态，我一点也不感到惊讶。”

items.title: Alibaba-affiliate Ant Group rushes into humanoid robots with a dozen deals in 18 months
items.summary: Ant has led a 500 million yuan ($73.59 million) funding round in humanoid robotics company Zeroth, the start-up announced Thursday.
items.title_zh: 阿里巴巴旗下蚂蚁集团在 18 个月内完成十几笔交易，进军人形机器人领域
items.summary_zh: 仿人机器人公司 Zeroth 周四宣布，蚂蚁金服已领投该公司一轮 5 亿元人民币（7359 万美元）的融资。

items.title: Michael Burry says he's shorting Caterpillar for the first time after it nearly doubled in the AI-driven rally of 2026
items.summary: "Caterpillar jumped out at me," Burry said. "I have never shorted Caterpillar. It has always done great for me on the long side in the past."
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 表示，在 2026 年人工智能驱动的反弹中，卡特彼勒 (Caterpillar) 几乎翻了一番后，他首次做空卡特彼勒 (Caterpillar)
items.summary_zh: “毛毛虫向我扑来，”伯里说。 “我从未做空卡特彼勒。过去，它在做多方面一直对我有很大帮助。”

items.title: Ukrainian suspect hunted by police after Monaco bomb attack was 'disguised as a man'
items.summary: Officials believe the suspect may not have acted alone and spent days casing out the scene of the attack.
items.title_zh: 摩纳哥炸弹袭击后被警方追捕的乌克兰嫌疑人“伪装成男人”
items.summary_zh: 官员们认为，嫌疑人可能并非单独行动，他花了数天时间搜寻袭击现场。

items.title: Anguished families left to identify Venezuela quake victims at makeshift morgue
items.summary: The disaster has overwhelmed local services, with bodies put outside or in tents for identification.
items.title_zh: 悲痛的家庭在临时太平间寻找委内瑞拉地震遇难者的身份
items.summary_zh: 这场灾难使当地服务不堪重负，尸体被放在外面或帐篷里进行身份识别。

items.title: Iran begins public mourning for Ayatollah killed in February
items.summary: Ali Khamenei's body will lie in state in Tehran's Grand Mosalla from Friday ahead of days-long funeral events.
items.title_zh: 伊朗开始公开哀悼二月份遇害的阿亚图拉
items.summary_zh: 阿里·哈梅内伊的遗体将于周五起在德黑兰大摩萨拉安放，随后举行为期数天的葬礼。

items.title: German row over plan for workers to need sick note on first day of illness
items.summary: A doctors' group says it "borders on madness" that patients will have to obtain the note in person.
items.title_zh: 德国因工人生病第一天需要病假条的计划而发生争议
items.summary_zh: 一个医生组织表示，患者必须亲自拿到这张纸条，这“近乎疯狂”。

items.title: Stand-up comic held for jokes about Erdoğan and Islam in Turkey crackdown
items.summary: Deniz Göktaş is regarded as one of Turkey's most popular comedians and is accused of "inciting hatred and hostility" on stage.
items.title_zh: 土耳其镇压中因拿埃尔多安和伊斯兰教开玩笑而举行的单口喜剧表演
items.summary_zh: 德尼兹·格克塔斯被认为是土耳其最受欢迎的喜剧演员之一，被指控在舞台上“煽动仇恨和敌意”。

items.title: Zuma showing South Africa 'middle finger' by meeting Gupta brother - minister
items.summary: Former President Zuma's trip to India reignites anger over a decade-old corruption scandal.
items.title_zh: 祖马会见古普塔兄弟-部长向南非伸出“中指”
items.summary_zh: 前总统祖马的印度之行再次引发了人们对长达十年的腐败丑闻的愤怒。

items.title: Dissident Hong Kong bookseller Lam Wing-kee dies aged 70
items.summary: Lam Wing-kee, who defied China by selling material critical of Beijing, passed away after suffering from lung cancer.
items.title_zh: 香港持不同政见书商林荣基去世，享年70岁
items.summary_zh: 因出售批评北京的材料而反抗中国的林永基因肺癌去世。

items.title: It’s Day 1 of the Supreme Leader’s Funeral, and Allies Gather in Iran
items.summary: Foreign dignitaries paid their respects to Ayatollah Ali Khamenei on Friday as days of ceremonies got underway.
items.title_zh: 这是最高领袖葬礼的第一天，盟友齐聚伊朗
items.summary_zh: 周五，随着几天的仪式开始，外国政要向阿亚图拉阿里·哈梅内伊表达了敬意。

items.title: China Defends Widely Criticized ‘Ethnic Unity’ Law
items.summary: Rights groups and Western officials have criticized the law as a threat to Tibetans, Uyghurs and other minorities. Beijing says the measure aims to protect them.
items.title_zh: 中国捍卫广受批评的“民族团结法”
items.summary_zh: 人权组织和西方官员批评该法律对藏人、维吾尔人和其他少数民族构成威胁。北京表示，这项措施旨在保护他们。

items.title: A U.S. Independence Celebration Damaged a Museum in Belgium
items.summary: There were black marks left on a structure in a central Brussels park after a fireworks display, the American ambassador to Belgium confirmed.
items.title_zh: 美国独立庆祝活动损坏了比利时的一座博物馆
items.summary_zh: 美国驻比利时大使证实，烟花表演结束后，布鲁塞尔市中心公园的一座建筑上留下了黑色痕迹。

items.title: U.S. Officials Believed Israel Was Plotting to Kill Iranian Negotiators
items.summary: Any Israeli attempt to kill Abbas Araghchi, the foreign minister, or Mohammad Ghalibaf, the Parliament speaker, would have derailed peace talks, American officials feared.
items.title_zh: 美国官员认为以色列正密谋杀害伊朗谈判代表
items.summary_zh: 美国官员担心，以色列任何杀害外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格奇或议会议长穆罕默德·加利巴夫的企图都会导致和谈脱轨。

items.title: A Hitler Bunker Faces Demolition in Housing-Challenged Berlin
items.summary: Preservation experts say the move to develop the site reflects a tension in Germany between the need to preserve historically significant monuments and the need to build and modernize.
items.title_zh: 住房困难的柏林一座希特勒地堡面临拆除
items.summary_zh: 保护专家表示，开发该遗址的举动反映了德国在保护具有历史意义的古迹的需要与建设和现代化的需要之间的紧张关系。

items.title: Tibetan Man Dies After Self-Immolation Protest in New York
items.summary: Lobga Rangzen, a 52-year-old resident of Queens, died after the self-immolation. He said Beijing’s policies were “destroying the Tibetan people.”
items.title_zh: 藏族男子在纽约自焚抗议后死亡
items.summary_zh: 52 岁的皇后区居民 Lobga Rangzen 在自焚后死亡。他说北京的政策正在“摧毁西藏人民”。

items.title: This sanctioned Russian stablecoin claims it processes billions, but blockchain analysts disagree
items.summary: A7A5 claims crypto data providers understate its trading activity, while blockchain analytics firms say the ruble-backed token's volumes have fallen sharply this year.
items.title_zh: 这个受制裁的俄罗斯稳定币声称其处理数十亿美元，但区块链分析师不同意
items.summary_zh: A7A5 声称加密数据提供商低估了其交易活动，而区块链分析公司表示，卢布支持的代币的交易量今年急剧下降。

items.title: Tokenization could make finance faster, but also more susceptible to shocks, IMF says
items.summary: Tokenization could make finance faster and cheaper. It also makes it more vulnerable to sudden shocks, the International Monetary Fund said.
items.title_zh: 国际货币基金组织表示，代币化可以使金融更快，但也更容易受到冲击
items.summary_zh: 代币化可以使金融变得更快、更便宜。国际货币基金组织表示，这也使其更容易受到突然冲击的影响。

items.title: Binance says MiCA should be judged by who it licenses, not who it excludes
items.summary: Europe head Gillian Lynch said Binance met Greece's licensing requirements and that the company remains committed to the EU, despite withdrawing its MiCA application days before the July 1 deadline.
items.title_zh: 币安表示，判断 MiCA 的标准应该是它向谁授予了许可，而不是它排除了谁
items.summary_zh: 欧洲负责人 Gillian Lynch 表示，币安满足了希腊的许可要求，并且该公司仍然致力于欧盟，尽管在 7 月 1 日截止日期前几天撤回了 MiCA 申请。

items.title: Samsung, Dunamu say they were listed as OUSD stablecoin consortium members without official consultation: report
items.summary: Samsung and Dunamu are among Korean firms saying they were listed as members of the OUSD stablecoin consortium without prior consultation.
items.title_zh: 三星、Dunamu 表示，他们在未经正式协商的情况下被列为 OUSD 稳定币联盟成员：报告
items.summary_zh: 三星和 Dunamu 等韩国公司表示，他们在未经事先协商的情况下被列为 OUSD 稳定币联盟的成员。

items.title: Grvt and the Rise of Composable Onchain Wealth
items.summary: Perp DEX Market Overview Perp DEX sector growth Perpetual futures have become the dominant instrument in crypto derivatives markets, with the decentralized venues offering them becoming the fastest-growing sector in Web3. Figure 1: Perp DEX share of total crypto perpetuals volume
items.title_zh: Grvt 和可组合链上财富的兴起
items.summary_zh: Perp DEX 市场概述 Perp DEX 行业增长 永续期货已成为加密货币衍生品市场的主导工具，为其提供的去中心化交易场所成为 Web3 中增长最快的行业。图 1：Perp DEX 占加密货币永续合约总交易量的份额

items.title: Spotify asks Kalshi, Polymarket to remove branding after manipulated streams used to settle music bets: Bloomberg
items.summary: Spotify asked Kalshi and Polymarket to drop its logo after 500,000 fake streams rigged a $3M music market, Bloomberg reported.
items.title_zh: Spotify 要求 Kalshi 和 Polymarket 在用于结算音乐投注的操纵流媒体后删除品牌：彭博社
items.summary_zh: 据彭博社报道，在 50 万个虚假流媒体操纵了价值 300 万美元的音乐市场后，Spotify 要求 Kalshi 和 Polymarket 放弃其徽标。

items.title: Securitize becomes first to debut shares on NYSE and onchain, but it won’t be the last
items.summary: President Brett Redfearn said the firm is in discussions to tokenize other IPOs "definitely ... within the next year.”
items.title_zh: Securitize 成为第一个在纽约证券交易所和链上首次公开发行股票的公司，但它不会是最后一个
items.summary_zh: 总裁 Brett Redfearn 表示，该公司正在讨论“肯定……在明年内”将其他 IPO 代币化。

items.title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
items.summary: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 的采用范围如何扩大
items.summary_zh: 新的 OpenAI Signals 数据显示了 ChatGPT 在全球范围内的采用情况如何增长，用户使用量不断增加，探索更多功能，并推动跨地区和语言的增长。

items.title: Inside Genebench-Pro
items.title_zh: Genebench-Pro 内部

items.title: Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity
items.summary: A new OpenAI report maps how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes.
items.title_zh: 绘制欧洲人工智能劳动力机会图
items.summary_zh: 一份新的 OpenAI 报告描绘了人工智能如何重塑整个欧盟的就业机会，强调哪些职业可能面临自动化、增长或工作流程变化。

items.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
items.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 推出 LLM 优化的推理芯片
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 推出 Jalapeo，这是一款专为 LLM 推理而构建的定制 AI 芯片，旨在提高 AI 系统的性能、效率和规模。

items.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
items.summary: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.
items.title_zh: 帮助建立先进人工智能的共享标准
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过 Appia 基金会帮助建立先进人工智能的共享标准，支持评估框架、安全实践和全球合作。

items.title: Hugging Face and Cerebras bring Gemma 4 to real-time voice AI
items.title_zh: Hugging Face 和 Cerebras 将 Gemma 4 引入实时语音 AI

items.title_zh: ScarfBench：企业 Java 框架迁移的 AI 代理基准测试

items.title_zh: 通过一个命令在 HF 作业上运行 vLLM 服务器

items.title_zh: FFASR 排行榜简介：现实世界中的 ASR 基准测试

items.title_zh: 每周通过 AI、开放工具和人员参与交付 Huggingface_hub

items.title_zh: 在 Transformers.js 中试验建议的跨域存储 API

items.title: Unlocking Britain’s next era of productivity: Building a nation of AI trailblazers
items.summary: Google UK shares its latest Economic Impact Report and how to enable more people to unlock the benefits of AI-powered technologies.
items.title_zh: 开启英国的下一个生产力时代：建设一个人工智能开拓者的国家
items.summary_zh: 谷歌英国分享了最新的经济影响报告，以及如何让更多人享受到人工智能技术带来的好处。

items.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
items.summary: A Google expert explains what it means to take a full-stack approach to AI and why it’s been the foundation of our AI work for so long.
items.title_zh: 问AI专家：全栈到底是什么？
items.summary_zh: 一位 Google 专家解释了采用全栈方法处理 AI 意味着什么，以及为什么它长期以来一直是我们 AI 工作的基础。

items.title: We’re strengthening our presence in Alabama through new investments and community support.
items.summary: Google has announced a $1.5 billion investment for 2026 and 2027 to expand its data center campus in Jackson County, Alabama. Operating since 2019 on a repurposed former…
items.title_zh: 我们正在通过新的投资和社区支持来加强我们在阿拉巴马州的业务。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌宣布在 2026 年和 2027 年投资 15 亿美元，扩建其位于阿拉巴马州杰克逊县的数据中心园区。自 2019 年起在改造后的前…

items.title: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们在弗吉尼亚州的新社区投资支持当地就业并扩大能源负担能力。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: 5 ways Google Search can level up your thrift and vintage shopping
items.summary: Uncover second-hand scores with AI tools in Google Search and Shopping.
items.title_zh: Google 搜索提升您的旧货购物水平的 5 种方式
items.summary_zh: 使用 Google 搜索和购物中的 AI 工具发现二手乐谱。

items.title: MIT in the media: Innovating and educating for the next 250 years of America
items.summary: During a "Washington Post Live" panel discussion with ASU President Michael Crow, President Sally Kornbluth explored how universities are preparing the next generation of scientists to lead in America’s rapidly changing technological landscape.
items.title_zh: 媒体中的麻省理工学院：为美国未来 250 年进行创新和教育
items.summary_zh: 在与亚利桑那州立大学校长迈克尔·克劳 (Michael Crow) 举行的“华盛顿邮报直播”小组讨论中，校长萨莉·科恩布鲁斯 (Sally Kornbluth) 探讨了大学如何培养下一代科学家，以引领美国快速变化的技术格局。

items.title: Q&A: What is agentic AI today, and what do we want it to be?
items.summary: Computer scientist Phillip Isola cuts through the hype to explain how AI agents work and what the future might hold for this rapidly advancing technology.
items.title_zh: 问答：今天的代理人工智能是什么？我们希望它是什么？
items.summary_zh: 计算机科学家 Phillip Isola 打破了炒作，解释了人工智能代理的工作原理以及这项快速发展的技术的未来。

items.title: 3 Questions: Beyond data-driven aesthetics
items.summary: In a new Keller Gallery exhibition, Alexandros Haridis SM ’17, PhD ’22 traces centuries of ideas about aesthetic judgment and explores how design can make complex computational systems visible.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：超越数据驱动的美学
items.summary_zh: 在凯勒画廊的新展览中，Alexandros Haridis SM '17、PhD '22 追溯了几个世纪以来有关审美判断的想法，并探索了设计如何使复杂的计算系统变得可见。

items.title: MIT in the media: Exploring how curiosity-driven science is an essential ingredient in America’s success
items.summary: “Scientific American” showcases the history and future of America’s scientific engine, highlighting promising young scientists and icons at MIT and beyond.
items.title_zh: 媒体中的麻省理工学院：探索好奇心驱动的科学如何成为美国成功的重要因素
items.summary_zh: 《科学美国人》展示了美国科学引擎的历史和未来，重点关注麻省理工学院及其他地区有前途的年轻科学家和偶像。

items.title: Improving the speed and energy-efficiency of AI agents
items.summary: A new system, known as Murakkab, optimizes the design and deployment of multistep workflows that power AI applications.
items.title_zh: 提高人工智能代理的速度和能源效率
items.summary_zh: 名为 Murakkab 的新系统优化了支持人工智能应用程序的多步骤工作流程的设计和部署。
